Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class OpportunitySettings2

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.OpportunitySettings2
public class OpportunitySettings2 extends SObject

Java class for OpportunitySettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="OpportunitySettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AutoActivateNewReminders" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CustomizableProductSchedulesEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DoesEnforceStandardOpportunitySaveLogic" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DurableId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FindSimilarOppFilter" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}FindSimilarOppFilter" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FindSimilarOppFilterId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FullName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsExpandedPipelineInspectionSetupEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsFindSimilarOpportunitiesEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsForecastCategoryMetricsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsOpportunityFieldHistoryTrackingEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsOpportunityInsightsInMobileEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsOpportunityTeamEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsPipelineChangesMetricsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsPipelineInspectionEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsPipelineInspectionFlowEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsPipelineInspectionSingleCategoryRollupEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsRevenueInsightsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsServiceCaseInsightsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsUpdateRemindersEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Metadata" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}OpportunitySettings" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OppAmountDealMotionEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OppCloseDateDealMotionEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PromptToAddProducts" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PushCountEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SimpleOppCreateFromContact" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SimpleOppCreateFromEvent" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
